theory.canonical_statement: s governed by: H_tunnel: Quantum tunneling through ribose 2�OH barrier via effective mass m_eff H_ER: Einstein-Rosen induced topology on phosphodiester manifold via Ricci curvature coupling $H_SC: Superconducting π-stacking with BCS-like pairing term and chemical potential μ$ H_cym: Cymatic helical modulation using Bessel functions J_n at harmonic frequencies H_TZP: Trawin Zero Point operator with dimensional-collapse term C_dim(t) Lindblad Master Equation $dρ/dt = -i[H_Trawin, ρ] + Σ_k ℒ_k(ρ)$ $The jump operators L_ribose, L_thymine, L_helix enforce RNA ↔ DNA transitions with explicit$ rates. Under mild irreducibility conditions, the system converges to unique B-form DNA steady state. This is mathematically rigorous and properly formalized using standard quantum master equation theory. Exceptional Strengths: Curry-Howard-Lambek type-theoretic grounding (every claim has a type signature) Categorical framework with fully faithful functor proofs Resurgent trans-series handli
